title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude is used by the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to visualize thought patterns and cognitive processes of drivers and pit crew during races. The AI analyzes pressure responses and transforms sensor readings into visual designs displayed on team apparel and garage equipment.
